name: Marketplace
description: Adds a marketplace entity and resource trading flow.
shortDescription: A Galactic Trade Network marketplace for listing, buying, and selling resources or items.
longDescription: Provides a Galactic Trade Network marketplace built around a dedicated marketplace entity, configurable item blacklists, listing limits, and resource trading. It includes client/server networking, timers, fonts, and resource handling so players can browse and trade through an in-world economy interface.

name: Faction Capture
description: Adds capturable territory/control point gameplay.
shortDescription: Territory capture points with contested progress, ownership, HUD updates, and faction rewards.
longDescription: Adds capturable territory points with named locations, persistent point data, capture progress, contested-state handling, and nearby HUD networking. The system counts eligible faction players in the capture radius, announces capture attempts, updates ownership, and supports faction reward logic.

name: Faction Raid System
description: Faction vs Faction PVP raid system with KDR tracking.
shortDescription: Faction raid orchestration with commands, cooldowns, assists, HUD updates, and KDR tracking.
longDescription: Adds faction-versus-faction raid management with high-command raid initiation, assist commands, raid hiding, status checks, global active-raid state, per-faction cooldowns, and persistent raid statistics. It tracks attacker/defender kills, deaths, assisting players, wins, losses, and client HUD updates.
